ValidationRule.description: Guarantor English Name cannot be null.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'NonLC',Possess_Guarantor_Y_N__c = true,ISBLANK( China_Credit_Insurance_Guarantor_Code__c ), ISBLANK( Guarantor_Country_Code__c ) ), TRUE, FALSE)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: There is the Credit Insurance Confirmation and China Credit Insurance Guarantor Code,Guarantor Country Code Cannot be Empty !
